hero.title: Welcome to our restaurant
brand.name: Leña Quiteña
hero.subcopy: Two locations in the heart of the Historic Center, a single flame that does not go out.
historia.slide1.title: Leña Quiteña
historia.slide1.p1: Nestled in the heart of Barrio San Marcos, one of the oldest and most authentic neighborhoods in the Historic Center of Quito, this place was born from the desire to preserve the traditional recipes that Quito grandmothers jealously kept in their yellowed notebooks.
historia.slide1.p2: Between its adobe and stone walls, the smoke from the wood mixes with the aromas of the usual stews. Each dish is a trip to the childhood table.
historia.slide1.address: Juan Pío Montúfar N4-14, Barrio San Marcos, Historic Center
historia.slide2.title: Leña Quiteña
historia.slide2.p1: La Ronda is perhaps the most loved and photographed street in Quito. Its flowery balconies, its centuries-old cobblestones and the murmur of its artisans make the perfect setting for a second chapter of Leña Quiteña.
historia.slide2.p2: The wood-fired kitchen dialogues with the living heritage that surrounds each table, creating an experience where flavor and history merge in each bite.
historia.slide2.address: Guayaquil Street S1-76, La Ronda, Historic Center, Quito
historia.slide2.schedule: Mon – Thu / Sun: 1:30 PM – 10:00 PM · Fri – Sat: 1:30 PM – 12:00 AM
historia.rating.copy: With a {rating} rating and the loyalty of hundreds of guests, {local} has become a benchmark of Andean cuisine.

resenas.title: Voices from Our Table
resenas.item1.text: The food is absolutely delicious, the service is top-notch, and the atmosphere is charming. The menu has fantastic offerings, with traditional and fusion dishes.
resenas.item1.author: International Visitor
resenas.item2.text: Small restaurant with traditional Ecuadorian dishes. Simple but delicious food, and friendly service. The guinea pig leg was succulent and the bondiola excellent.
resenas.item2.author: Gastronomic Traveler
resenas.item3.text: We had a long layover in Quito and decided to go to dinner here. It was definitely worth it. The place is beautiful, the waiter was amazing and the food absolutely delicious.
resenas.item3.author: Tourist in Transit

chat.bot.prices: Our prices range from *$3 to $24* depending on the dish. Shall I show you the full menu with all the prices?

chat.bot.bye: See you soon! 🔥 It was a pleasure. We are waiting for you at *Leña Quiteña* to delight you with the best Quito grill. Enjoy!
chat.bot.fallback: Got it. How can I help you with Leña Quiteña? I can share information about our menu, reservations, orders, opening hours, and more.
chat.reservation.ask_locale: Great, I can help with your reservation. Which location would you like?
chat.reservation.locale.invalid: I could not identify the location. Please choose San Marcos or La Ronda.
chat.reservation.ask_date: Great choice: {locale}. What date would you like to book?
chat.reservation.ask_time: What time should we expect you?
chat.reservation.ask_guests: How many guests will be in your party?
chat.reservation.guests.invalid: Please enter a valid number of guests (example: 4).
chat.reservation.ask_name: Perfect. Under what name should we register the reservation?
chat.reservation.ask_phone: Great. What is your contact phone number?
chat.reservation.success: Your reservation is confirmed! 🔥 We look forward to seeing you at Leña Quiteña.
chat.reservation.error: We could not save your reservation right now. Please try again or contact us on WhatsApp.
chat.reservation.cancelled: Reservation cancelled. How else can I help you?
